title: 2B Friend or Foe? — Конкуренция в индустрии

items.example: We should form an alliance with our rivals to strengthen our position.
Our biggest rival launched a similar product last month.
These new products will help us gain a competitive edge.
I think I really pushed beyond my limits last year to meet all the targets.
The two companies agreed to cooperate on the research project.
We need to act fast to gain advantage over our competitors.
They decided to form a partnership to expand into new markets.
By combining resources, both companies saved money and time.
